title: Configuration
description: Manage gateway, agent defaults, tools, and integrations
noConfigDescription: Could not load the configuration file. The gateway may be unreachable.
warning: Changes here affect all agents and channels globally. Misconfiguration may break the gateway.
server.title: Gateway Server
server.description: Network binding, authentication token, and access control
gateway.hostTip: The network interface the gateway listens on. Use 0.0.0.0 to listen on all interfaces.
gateway.portTip: The TCP port the gateway WebSocket and HTTP server binds to.
gateway.tokenTip: Bearer token required for all client connections. Leave empty to disable authentication.
gateway.tokenManaged: Token is managed via environment variable and cannot be edited here.
gateway.ownerIdsTip: User IDs granted admin-level access. Separate multiple IDs with Enter.
gateway.allowedOriginsTip: CORS allowed origins for the HTTP API. Use * to allow all origins.
gateway.maxMessageCharsTip: Maximum allowed character count per inbound message. Messages exceeding this limit are rejected.
gateway.rateLimitRpmTip: Maximum requests per minute per user. Set to 0 to disable rate limiting.
gateway.inboundDebounceMsTip: Delay in milliseconds before processing a new message, to coalesce rapid follow-ups. Set to -1 to disable.
agents.title: Agent Defaults
agents.description: Default LLM provider, model, and runtime settings applied to all agents unless overridden
agents.providerTip: Default LLM provider used when an agent does not specify one.
agents.modelTip: Default model used when an agent does not specify one.
agents.maxTokensTip: Maximum tokens the model can generate in a single response.
agents.temperatureTip: Sampling temperature (0-2). Lower values produce more deterministic output.
agents.maxToolIterationsTip: Maximum number of tool-call iterations per agent request.
agents.contextWindowTip: Total token budget for the model context window.
agents.workspaceTip: Root directory for agent file operations. Per-user subdirectories are created automatically.
agents.restrictToWorkspaceTip: Prevent agents from reading or writing files outside the workspace path.
agents.subagents.title: Subagents
agents.subagents.maxConcurrentTip: Maximum number of sub-agents that can run simultaneously.
agents.subagents.maxSpawnDepthTip: Maximum nesting depth for sub-agent chains.
agents.subagents.maxChildrenPerAgentTip: Maximum number of child sub-agents a single agent can spawn.
agents.subagents.archiveAfterMinTip: Minutes of inactivity before a sub-agent session is archived.
agents.subagents.modelOverrideTip: Force all sub-agents to use a specific model. Leave empty to inherit from the parent agent.
agents.memory.title: Memory
agents.memory.embeddingProviderTip: Provider used to generate text embeddings for memory storage.
agents.memory.embeddingModelTip: Embedding model name. Leave empty to use the provider default.
agents.memory.maxResultsTip: Maximum number of memory entries returned per recall query.
agents.memory.minScoreTip: Minimum similarity score (0-1) for a memory entry to be included in results.
agents.compaction.title: Compaction
agents.compaction.reserveTokensFloorTip: Minimum token buffer to reserve for new responses before compacting.
agents.compaction.maxHistoryShareTip: Fraction of the context window that conversation history can occupy.
agents.pruning.title: Context Pruning
agents.pruning.desc: Trim old tool results to free context space
agents.pruning.keepLastAssistantsTip: Number of recent assistant turns to always preserve during pruning.
agents.sandbox.title: Sandbox
agents.sandbox.imageTip: Docker image used for the sandbox container.
agents.sandbox.memoryMbTip: Memory limit for the sandbox container in megabytes.
agents.sandbox.cpusTip: CPU quota for the sandbox container (e.g. 1.0 = one full core).
agents.sandbox.timeoutSecTip: Maximum execution time in seconds before the sandbox is killed.
behavior.uxDescription: High-impact toggles that change how the gateway interacts with users
behavior.toolStatusHint: Show real-time tool execution status messages to users during agent runs.
behavior.toolStatusInfo: Users will see live updates as the agent reads files, runs commands, and calls APIs.
behavior.blockReplyHint: Wait for the agent to finish before sending intermediate status updates.
behavior.blockReplyInfo: Only the final response is sent. Intermediate tool status messages are suppressed.
behavior.intentClassifyHint: Classify user intent before routing to reduce unnecessary agent invocations.
behavior.intentClassifyInfo: Agent will only be invoked when the classifier detects actionable intent.
behavior.pendingCompactionDescription: Automatically summarize old group messages using LLM when the buffer exceeds a threshold
behavior.pendingCompactionThresholdTip: Trigger compaction when a group accumulates more than this many pending messages. Set to 0 to use the default (50).
behavior.pendingCompactionKeepRecentTip: Number of recent raw messages to keep after compaction. Older messages are replaced with an LLM summary. Default is 15.
behavior.pendingCompactionMaxTokensTip: Maximum output tokens for LLM summarization. Default is 4096.
behavior.pendingCompactionProviderTip: LLM provider for summarization. Leave empty to use the channel agent's provider.
behavior.pendingCompactionModelTip: Model for summarization. Leave empty to use the channel agent's model.
behavior.pendingCompactionInfo: When a group chat exceeds the threshold, the LLM automatically summarizes older messages into a single compact entry, keeping the most recent ones intact for context.
behavior.rateLimitDescription: Inbound message size limits and per-user request throttling
behavior.sessionsDescription: Controls how conversation context is partitioned across users and channels
behavior.securityDescription: Prompt injection detection and credential scrubbing to protect the gateway
behavior.injectionActionHint: What to do when a prompt injection attempt is detected in an inbound message.
behavior.injectionBlockInfo: All messages flagged as injection attempts will be blocked and the user will be notified.
behavior.injectionOffInfo: Injection detection is disabled. Malicious prompts will not be filtered.
behavior.scrubCredentialsHint: Automatically redact API keys, tokens, and passwords found in tool output before returning to the agent.
behavior.scrubCredentialsInfo: Credential patterns in tool responses are masked before the agent sees them.
behavior.scrubCredentialsOffInfo: Credential scrubbing is disabled. Secrets in tool output may be exposed to the agent.
sessions.scopeTip: Determines how sessions are partitioned. 'Per Sender' gives each user a separate session; 'Global' shares one session across all users.
sessions.dmScopeTip: How direct-message sessions are keyed. 'Per Channel Peer' is the recommended default.
quota.title: Usage Quota
quota.description: Per-user message quota limits with optional per-provider, channel, and group overrides
quota.enabledTip: When enabled, users are limited to the message counts defined below.
quota.defaultLimitsTip: Fallback quota applied to all users not covered by a specific override.
quota.providerOverridesTip: Custom quota limits per LLM provider. Overrides the default when users interact through a specific provider.
quota.channelOverridesTip: Custom quota limits per channel type (e.g. telegram, discord).
quota.groupOverridesTip: Custom quota limits for specific group chats.
tools.title: Tool Profile
tools.description: Default tool availability and per-hour call rate limit for all agents
tools.profileTip: Predefined tool set. 'Minimal' exposes only safe read-only tools; 'Full' enables all tools.
tools.rateLimitPerHourTip: Maximum tool calls allowed per agent per hour. Set to 0 to disable.
tools.allowTip: Explicitly allow additional tools not included in the selected profile.
tools.denyTip: Explicitly block tools even if included in the selected profile.
tools.alsoAllowTip: Additional tools to allow on top of the profile. Useful when using a restrictive profile.
tools.execSecurityTip: Controls which shell commands agents are permitted to run. 'Allowlist' restricts to approved patterns.
tools.execAskModeTip: When to prompt the user for approval before executing a command.
tools.webFetchPolicyTip: Controls which URLs the agent can fetch. 'Allowlist' restricts to approved domains only.
tools.blockedDomainsTip: Domains always blocked regardless of policy. One entry per line, supports wildcards (*.example.com).
tts.title: Text-to-Speech
cron.title: Cron Scheduler
cron.description: Retry behaviour for failed scheduled tasks
cron.maxRetriesTip: Maximum number of retry attempts for a failed cron task.
cron.defaultTimezoneTip: IANA timezone for cron expressions when not set per-job (e.g. Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh). Leave empty to use server system timezone.
telemetry.title: Telemetry (OpenTelemetry)
telemetry.description: Export traces and metrics to an OpenTelemetry-compatible backend
telemetry.enabledTip: Enable OpenTelemetry trace export. Requires the 'otel' build tag.
telemetry.endpointTip: OTLP exporter endpoint (host:port). For gRPC default is 4317, HTTP is 4318.
telemetry.protocolTip: Transport protocol for the OTLP exporter.
telemetry.serviceNameTip: Service name reported in traces. Useful for filtering in the observability backend.
telemetry.insecureTip: Disable TLS for the OTLP connection. Only use in local/dev environments.
telemetry.headersTip: Additional HTTP headers sent with each OTLP export request (e.g. API keys for hosted backends).
bindings.title: Agent Bindings
bindings.description: Route specific channels, peers, or accounts to a designated agent
bindings.noBindings: No bindings configured. All messages are routed to the default agent.
providers.title: Provider API Keys
providers.description: Override API keys and base URLs for configured LLM providers
providers.noProviders: No providers found in the configuration file.
channels.title: Channel Settings
channels.description: Configure built-in channel integrations (tokens, policies, streaming)
channels.noChannels: No channels found in the configuration file.
channels.draftTransportHint: Stealth streaming preview in DMs (no notifications per edit)
channels.reasoningStreamHint: Display AI thinking process as a separate message
